_metadata.description: Tiered enhanced delivery systems for bioavailability scoring
_metadata.scoring_rule: Award bonus points based on delivery technology tier. Only the HIGHEST tier match counts (no stacking).

tier_1.name: Premium Delivery
tier_1.description: Advanced technologies with clinically proven 10x+ bioavailability increase (liposomal, phytosome, nanoemulsion, patented curcumin forms)

tier_2.name: Enhanced Delivery
tier_2.description: Proven absorption enhancement (chelated minerals, sublingual, enteric coating, active vitamin forms)

tier_3.name: Basic Enhanced
tier_3.description: Modest improvements over standard forms (softgels, powders, fermented, freeze-dried)

_metadata.detection_note: Search labelText.raw + ingredient forms + product name (case-insensitive). Award only the single highest tier match.
_metadata.pipeline_integration: Used by enrichment script to award delivery bonus points during scoring preparation

vesisorb.description: Colloidal droplet system – clinically proven superior absorption

nanoemulsion.description: Ultra-fine oil-in-water emulsion – rapid high absorption

novasol.description: Micellar solubilization – up to 185x bioavailability increase for curcumin

micellar.description: Micelle encapsulation – superior intestinal wall interaction, pH resistant

licaps.description: Liquid-filled hard capsule technology for enhanced absorption

longvida.description: SLCP (Solid Lipid Curcumin Particle) – 65x more bioavailable

lozenge.description: Partial sublingual + mechanical dissolution – excellent for oral/immune actives

oral spray.description: Sublingual spray – fast onset, high bioavailability

chelated.description: Amino-acid bound minerals – 40-90% better absorption than oxides

traacs.description: Albion patented chelates – gold-standard mineral chelation

micronized.description: Particle size reduction – proven 2-5× surface area increase

drcaps.description: Delayed-release capsule – releases 75-120 min after ingestion, protects from stomach acid

bio-tract.description: Time-release tablet – delivers 15x more probiotics, 8-10 hour release

acid-resistant.description: Stomach acid protection for sensitive ingredients

curcuwin.description: UltraSOL nutrient delivery – 46x more bioavailable curcumin

bcm-95.description: Curcumin with essential oils – 7x more bioavailable (Curcugreen)

self-emulsifying.description: SEDDS/SMEDDS – forms nanoemulsion in GI tract

cyclodextrin.description: Molecular encapsulation – enhanced solubility and stability

nanoparticle.description: Nano-sized particles for enhanced cellular uptake

zeta potential.description: Optimized surface charge for enhanced absorption

threonate.description: Threonic acid chelate – crosses blood-brain barrier (Magtein)

arginate.description: Arginine chelate – supports nitric oxide production

aspartate.description: Aspartic acid chelate – supports energy metabolism

hydroxyapatite.description: Bone-derived calcium form – highly bioavailable MCHA/MCHC

plantcaps.description: Pullulan-based plant capsule – natural fermentation derived

optimsm.description: Purified MSM with enhanced absorption profile

quatrefolic.description: Glucosamine salt of 5-MTHF – superior folate bioavailability

methylcobalamin.description: Active coenzyme B12 form – no conversion needed

p5p.description: Pyridoxal-5-phosphate – active B6, no liver conversion

ubiquinol.description: Reduced CoQ10 form – 8x more bioavailable than ubiquinone

r-lipoic acid.description: Natural R-isomer – more bioactive than racemic ALA

drops.description: Liquid form – flexible dosing, faster than tablets

food-grown.description: Nutrients grown in food matrix for recognition

microactive.description: BioActives sustained-release micronized technology – enhanced bioavailability for CoQ10, curcumin, and other compounds

siliphos.description: Silybin-phosphatidylcholine phytosome complex – 10x improved milk thistle bioavailability

greenselect.description: EGCG-phospholipid phytosome – enhanced green tea catechin absorption

maxsimil.description: Self-microemulsifying fish oil technology – 3x improved omega-3 absorption

suprabio.description: Tocomin SupraBio – self-emulsifying delivery system for enhanced tocotrienol absorption

hydrocurc.description: LipiSperse cold water dispersible curcumin – enhanced bioavailability via colloidal dispersion

curqfen.description: Fenugreek galactomannan-curcumin complex – 45x improved curcumin bioavailability
